'''Akk wolves''' were larger versions of the [[Akk dog/Legends|akk dogs]] that lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]].<ref name="Shatterpoint" /> Akk wolves were also present on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]].<ref name="TOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>
{{Creature-stub}}
